name: Aviation
description: WorldWideView plugin for real-time commercial aircraft tracking via the OpenSky Network API. Renders 3D aircraft models with altitude-based coloring, flight trails, and country/altitude/callsign filters
author: WorldWideView

name: Maritime
description: WorldWideView plugin for real-time vessel tracking via AIS feeds. Color-coded by vessel type with speed and heading indicators
author: WorldWideView

name: Military Aviation
description: WorldWideView plugin for real-time military aircraft tracking via adsb.lol. Features altitude-based coloring, flight trail rendering, and aircraft type filters
author: WorldWideView

name: Wildfire
description: WorldWideView plugin for active wildfire and hotspot detection using NASA FIRMS (VIIRS) satellite data. Supports tiered LOD rendering and FRP-based sizing
author: WorldWideView

name: Camera
description: WorldWideView plugin for displaying public live cameras and traffic cameras on the globe. Supports custom data sources via URL, file upload, and GeoJSON
author: WorldWideView

name: Borders
description: WorldWideView plugin that displays political borders and country labels as a globe overlay
author: WorldWideView

name: Military Bases
